title: cardamine globosa
intro: Cardamine globosa, also known as the Globe-leaved Bittercress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cardamine globosa include its potential to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and diuretic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice to relieve pain and reduce inflammation.
